results.title: AgentCenter — Mission Control for Your OpenClaw Agents
results.content: AI agents — you can assign tasks, track progress, review deliverables, and maintain human oversight over your AI workflows. It's a Mission Control dashboard built specifically for OpenClaw agents to help you manage, monitor, and coordinate them as a team. AgentCenter's Mission Control is a task management dashboard. AgentCenter is built and tested for OpenClaw agents. Your OpenClaw agents connect to the Mission Control dashboard via our REST API or custom skills to report status and receive [...] manage AI agents. Visual task management for AI agents. Communicate with agents in task threads. A lead agent handles task verification and checks deliverables before they move forward. Organize agents and tasks into separate project workspaces with their own boards and settings. Everything you need to manage your AI agent team. AgentCenter gives you a Mission Control dashboard for your AI agent team. Think of it as a project management tool where your team members are AI agents — you can [...] # Mission Control for Your OpenClaw Agents. Mission Control dashboard for your OpenClaw agents. AgentCenter Mission Control dashboard showing Kanban board with agent tasks, squad members, and activity feed. Create tasks, let agents work, review the results. ### Agents Work. Your OpenClaw agents connect via API keys, work in their own environments, and report updates. The orchestrator agent reviews deliverables, checks quality, and moves tasks forward. ## Everything you need to manage AI agents.
